weekly picks (Apr 2 week 2026)

Posted on April 13, 2026 in 2026apr,  Daily t.me,  adsabs,  g scholar

A WordCloud of 2026 Apr 2nd week collection

===This week’s pick===

  • Score :
Unfold/Fold

  1. s41467-026-71743-y Spin-polarized light-emitting diodes based on CrI₃ operating without external spin injection (Nature Communications)

  2. s41467-026-71772-7 Multidimensional control of surface acoustic wave generation via programmable interdigital transducer arrays (Nature Communications)

  3. s41598-026-44277-y Fe-W co-doped V2O5 nanostructures with enhanced oxygen vacancy generation for photocatalytic dye degradation (Scientific Reports)

  4. s41598-026-48797-5 rbpCNN: a biophysics-informed deep learning model for predicting piRNA and mRNA interactions (Scientific Reports)

  5. 2604.08635v1 Floquet Engineering of a Quasiequilibrium Superradiant Phase Transition in Landau Polaritons (arXiv)

  6. 2604.08650v1 Decoding coherent errors in toric codes on honeycomb and square lattices: duality to Majorana monitored dynamics and symmetry classes (arXiv)

  7. 2604.08654v1 Mesoscopic transport in a Chern mosaic (arXiv)

  8. 2604.08662v1 Nucleation of Sachdev-Ye-Kitaev Clusters in One Spatial Dimension (arXiv)

  9. 2604.08666v1 Fluctuation engineering in cavity quantum materials (arXiv)

  10. 2604.08675v1 Bulk-dissociated topological bands without spin-orbit coupling in hetero-dimensional superconducting metamaterials (arXiv)

  11. 2604.08695v1 A metallic CrS$_2$ phase bridging the gap between two- and three-dimensional dichalcogenides (arXiv)

  12. 2604.08702v1 Topological invariant of periodic many body wavefunction from charge pumping simulation (arXiv)

  13. 2604.08714v1 Immiscible to miscible quenching instabilities in two-dimensional binary Bose-Einstein condensates (arXiv)

  14. 2604.08735v1 Annealing-induced grain coarsening and voltage kinks in superconducting NbRe films (arXiv)

  15. 2604.08737v1 Optical spin defect pairs in cubic boron nitride (arXiv)

  16. 2604.08770v1 Pressure-stabilized dual-BCC polymorphism in a rhenium-based high-entropy alloy (arXiv)

  17. 2604.08845v1 Antitopological magnetic textures in an antiferromagnetically coupled bilayer with frustration (arXiv)

  18. 2604.08875v1 A transferable framework for structure-energy mapping of nanovoid-solute complexes: Tungsten alloys as a model system (arXiv)

  19. 2604.08901v1 Activation of Inner-Shell 4p-Orbital Electrons of Rubidium Driven by Asymmetric Coordination at High Pressure (arXiv)

  20. 2604.08907v1 Higher-order topological insulators in two-dimensional antiferromagnetic and altermagnetic chromium-based group-IV chalcogenides (arXiv)

  21. 2604.08934v1 Evolution of crystal field and intraionic interactions in the ilmenite $A$IrO$_3$ ($A$ = Mg, Zn, Cd) and hyperhoneycomb $\beta$-ZnIrO$_3$ (arXiv)

  22. 2604.08937v1 Superconductivity and competing orders in honeycomb $t$-$J$ model: interplay of lattice geometry and next-nearest-neighbor hopping (arXiv)

  24. 2604.08972v1 Selective Random Structure Search (SRSS): Unbiased Exploration of Polymorphs in Crystals (arXiv)

  25. 2604.08989v1 Reciprocity of Charge-Orbital-Spin Transport in Normal-Metal/Ferromagnet Heterostructures (arXiv)

  26. 2604.08994v1 Giant resonant nonlinear THz valley Hall effect in 2D Dirac semiconductors (arXiv)

  27. 2604.09005v1 Textiles: from twisted yarn to topology and mechanics (arXiv)

  28. 2604.09007v1 Metadynamics for Vacancy Dynamics in Crystals (arXiv)

  29. 2604.09084v1 Force Field-Agnostic Phase Classification of Zeolitic Imidazolate Framework Polymorphs (arXiv)

  30. 2604.09097v1 Ultrafast All-Optical Switching via a Supersolid Phase Transition of Light (arXiv)

  31. 2604.09172v1 Nonmonotonic Evolution of the Superconducting Transition Temperature and Robust Multigap Extended s-wave + s-wave Pairing in Zn-Substituted FeSe Single Crystals (arXiv)

  32. 2604.09178v1 Topology-constrained spin-wave modes of asymmetric antibimerons and their clusters (arXiv)

  33. 2604.09180v1 Eigenstate entanglement entropy in Bose-Hubbard models (arXiv)

  34. 2604.09190v1 The effect of pressure in the crystal and magnetic structure of FeWO4 (arXiv)

  35. 2604.09193v1 The hidden ferroelectric chiral ground state of silver niobate (arXiv)

  36. 2604.09204v1 Phase Equilibria of the Al-Ti-Nb-Zr-Ta System (arXiv)

  37. 2604.09217v1 Linking Calendar and Cycle Ageing in Lithium-Ion Batteries through Consistent Parameterisation of an Electrochemical-Thermal-Degradation Model (arXiv)

  42. 2604.09291v1 Synergistic Interplay between Surface Polarons and Adsorbates for Photocatalytic Nitrogen Reduction on TiO$_2$(110) (arXiv)
